summary: Iteration 48: Rummy AI game, Poker AI game, CardGames hub leaderboard/streak, GameLobby Play vs AI buttons, EarnCoins Mini Games tab. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All 24+ frontend features verified and working correctly. Both games are fully playable with complete game loops.
critical_code_review_comments: PokerGame.js: `doPlayerAction` function (line 180) is defined but never called (dead code). Only `handlePlayerAction` (line 227) is used. Minor cleanup recommended.

RummyGame.js: Declare button always shows '/4 found' hardcoded. Edge case: if player somehow gets more/fewer than 4 melds, the counter would be misleading. Currently acceptable since 13-card rummy typically needs 4×3 groups.

RummyGame.js: Meld color coding assigns colors by ORDER of discovery (first meld gets purple #a855f7, second gets green #22c55e, etc.) not by meld TYPE. The review request describes it as 'purple=Set, green=Sequence' but code behavior is order-based. This is a cosmetic inconsistency between description and code, not a functional bug.
v2_routes.py line 1065: card-streak endpoint uses a while loop iterating backwards from today to compute streak - correct implementation with safety limit of 30 iterations.
PokerGame.js: getAIAction uses filler cards when community < 3 (lines 82-83). This is a reasonable workaround for pre-flop AI evaluation.
All 4 new backend routes correctly require auth where needed (rummy-win, poker-win, card-streak need auth; card-leaderboard is public).
test_credentials: test_redesign_ui26@free11test.com / Test@1234 (rummy-win and poker-win already claimed today, returns 400 on repeat as expected)
seed_data_creation: None. Test user already had streak=2 (played today) and 175 coins total (4 wins) from previous test sessions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rummy game at /games/rummy/play: selectors: [data-testid='rummy-game'], [data-testid='draw-deck-btn'], [data-testid='draw-discard-btn'], [data-testid='discard-btn'], [data-testid='declare-btn'], [data-testid='rummy-result'], [data-testid='rummy-play-again'], [data-testid='rummy-back-games']. Poker game at /games/poker/play: selectors: [data-testid='poker-game'], [data-testid='poker-fold'], [data-testid='poker-call'], [data-testid='poker-raise'], [data-testid='poker-ai-thinking'], [data-testid='poker-result'], [data-testid='poker-play-again'], [data-testid='poker-back-games']. CardGames hub: [data-testid='streak-card'], [data-testid='leaderboard-preview'], [data-testid='full-leaderboard'], [data-testid='game-card-rummy'], [data-testid='game-card-poker']. GameLobby: [data-testid='play-vs-ai-btn']. EarnCoins Mini Games: [data-testid='rummy-card'], [data-testid='poker-card']. Backend: POST /api/v2/earn/rummy-win (200 first, 400 repeat, 50 coins), POST /api/v2/earn/poker-win (200 first, 400 repeat, 60 coins), GET /api/v2/games/card-leaderboard (public), GET /api/v2/games/card-streak (auth required). Test user streak was 2 days as of today.

rca_of_issues: No issues found. All new features working as expected. The only minor code note is dead code (doPlayerAction in PokerGame.js) which does not impact functionality.
